privileged_info_summary: The Mitosis (5D stack) is a genuine 26 MB fluorescence microscopy dataset built into Fiji/ImageJ, consisting of HeLa cells with H2B-GFP construct. The actual image dimensions are 171×196 pixels with 2 channels and 51 time frames across 5 z-slices. Critical discrepancy: the task metadata claims 51 z-slices and 5 time frames (reversed). Actual channels are H2B-GFP (chromatin/chromosomes staining) and transmission imaging, not FITC (spindle) and DAPI/Hoechst as claimed. The data is real experimental fluorescence microscopy, not synthetic.
